text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. It involves two main tasks: image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. For example, a computer can recognize a cat in a photo or detect all the cars in a street scene. This technology has many important applications. Perhaps the most exciting use is in self-driving cars. These vehicles use computer vision to see pedestrians, road signs, and other cars, allowing them to navigate safely. Computer vision is also used in medical imaging, security cameras, and smartphone photo tools.
